rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §37.020, which governs school district reporting on suspensions, expulsions, and DAEP placements. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 37.020. REPORTS RELATING TO OUT-OF-SCHOOL SUSPENSIONS, EXPULSIONS, AND DISCIPLINARY ALTERNATIVE EDUCATION PROGRAM PLACEMENTS.
_note: Rule text concerns school discipline reporting; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
